synopsis: A Star Wars saga decades in the making! Meet the droid-hating Valance the Hunter - who's hot on the trail of Luke Skywalker! Will his destiny end by finding the rebel hero - or in a deadly confrontation with Darth Vader? Then, on a routine X-wing patrol, Luke and his squadron find a derelict Imperial Star Destroyer, with everyone on board dead - and their skin turned crimson! When the virus responsible leaves Luke in a coma, Han Solo and his allies face a race against time to cure the mysterious malady! Then, in the landmark Star Wars #108, return at last to the classic Marvel galaxy of a long
title: Star Wars (1977): Forever Crimson
